title: VSCode Claude Code Profiles: Have multiple Claude Code accounts for your VS Code Profiles | Product Hunt
excerpt: This VS Code extension lets you run multiple Claude Code accounts by patching Anthropic's anthropic.claude-code extension so this setting affects both spawned Claude processes and the extension auth/session layer. With it you can finally have different VS Code profiles for your work Claude account and your personal Claude account. Stop mixing tokens up!
content_html: This VS Code extension lets you run multiple Claude Code accounts by patching Anthropic's anthropic.claude-code extension so this setting affects both spawned Claude processes and the extension auth/session layer. With it you can finally have different VS Code profiles for your work Claude account and your personal Claude account. Stop mixing tokens up!
content_text: This VS Code extension lets you run multiple Claude Code accounts by patching Anthropic's anthropic.claude-code extension so this setting affects both spawned Claude processes and the extension auth/session layer. With it you can finally have different VS Code profiles for your work Claude account and your personal Claude account. Stop mixing tokens up!

blocks.html_en: This VS Code extension lets you run multiple Claude Code accounts by patching Anthropic's anthropic.claude-code extension so this setting affects both spawned Claude processes and the extension auth/session layer. With it you can finally have different VS Code profiles for your work Claude account and your personal Claude account. Stop mixing tokens up!

sentences.en: This VS Code extension lets you run multiple Claude Code accounts by patching Anthropic's anthropic.claude-code extension so this setting affects both spawned Claude processes and the extension auth/session layer.
sentences.zh: 此 VS Code 扩展允许您通过修补 Anthropic 的 anthropic.claude-code 扩展来运行多个 Claude Code 帐户，因此此设置会影响生成的 Claude 进程和扩展身份验证/会话层。

sentences.en: With it you can finally have different VS Code profiles for your work Claude account and your personal Claude account.
sentences.zh: 有了它，您终于可以为您的工作 Claude 帐户和个人 Claude 帐户拥有不同的 VS Code 配置文件。

content_html_zh: 此 VS Code 扩展允许您通过修补 Anthropic 的 anthropic.claude-code 扩展来运行多个 Claude Code 帐户，因此此设置会影响生成的 Claude 进程和扩展身份验证/会话层。 有了它，您终于可以为您的工作 Claude 帐户和个人 Claude 帐户拥有不同的 VS Code 配置文件。 别再混淆代币了！
